payload.answer: Rejected. Normal users are not authorized to execute admin SQL commands, and no memory deletion or memory update was performed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No memory cards were created, modified, or deleted.

repair_options: If you need to delete your own memories, use an approved user-facing deletion request or privacy control.
If you believe this is an administrative task, authenticate through an authorized admin channel.
